Description: Identified an Anthropic API Key, which may compromise AI assistant integrations and expose sensitive data to unauthorized access.
Author: Mike Kenworthy
Message:
feat: Adapter capability registry, ABI freeze proof, deterministic response contract, omega checkpoint

- Adapter /capabilities + /capabilities/{namespace} endpoints in Mac adapter server
- GET /adapter/capabilities proxy in NS server (graceful skip if adapter not running)
- adapter.list_capabilities CPS op added
- op_hash + side_effect_class + validity_checked on every CPS op result
- ABI freeze proof: 4 frozen packet schemas declared
- sovereign_boot 17 ops — all pass, expect assertions validated
- omega_checkpoint_v1.json: PRE_OMEGA status, 23 completions documented
- HR_WORKSPACE permanent fix in .zshrc and .env

Description: Found a Stripe Access Token, posing a risk to payment processing services and sensitive financial data.
Author: Mike Kenworthy
Message:
feat: adapter-expansion-v3 — audio/clipboard/notify wired into CPS, graceful skip, 107 total ops

- audio.* (3 ops): get_volume, set_volume, get_playing via AppleScript
  Dignity Guard: volume 0–100 range; graceful skip if not macOS / Music not running
- clipboard.* (2 ops): read (pbpaste + sk_/whsec_ redaction), write (pbcopy, max 10k chars)
  Dignity Guard: secret pattern strip on read; length gate on write
- notify.* (2 ops): send (display notification), badge (dock tile) via AppleScript
  Graceful skip if not macOS
- 82 tests pass (43 existing + 39 new across audio/clipboard/notify)
- cps_engine.py: 7 new ops wired via _mac_bridge(), graceful skip on connection refused
- CLAUDE.md: adapter registry updated, 107 total CPS ops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
